title: tabs data model
description: Add the `tabs` table (`id, page_id, titulo, ordem`) to the Drizzle schema, supporting both standard tabs (Usage, Code, Accessibility) and custom-named tabs.
acceptanceCriteria: `tabs` table exists with `id, page_id (fk -> pages.id), titulo, ordem`
No uniqueness constraint is required on `titulo` within a page — a page may have two tabs with the same custom name if the user chooses (document this as an accepted MVP simplification)
Migration applies cleanly on top of prior migrations
Deleting a page cascades to its tabs consistent with the cascade decision made for sections/pages

steps.details: Run `drizzle-kit generate` and confirm the foreign key cascade behavior matches pages/sections.
Insert a page with two tabs ('Usage', 'Code'), confirm both read back correctly ordered by `ordem`, and confirm deleting the parent page removes both tabs.

technicalNotes: Tab titles are free text, not a fixed enum, per the PRD's 'Usage, Code, Accessibility, custom' language — do not constrain to a hardcoded set.
